title: Leucostegia parva
taxonomy: Leucostegia parva is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Leucostegia, which is part of the phylum Pteridophyta. This genus is further classified under the division Pteridophyta, also known as ferns. The Hymenophyllaceae family is a group of filmy ferns, which are characterized by their delicate and thin leaves. These classifications help us understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the Leucostegia parva species.
